disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Symptoms began suddenly and immediately after unexpectedly passing a specific place linked to a community the patient used to belong to
trigger_question_examples: What was happening just before this started?
Was there anything that set this off tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started the moment I walked past a building connected to a community I left. Seeing it hit me and then the retching and panic came on.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Repeated vomiting and retching with inability to keep any fluid down
trigger_question_examples: Are you able to keep any fluids down?
How much have you been vomiting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can't stop retching. Every time I sip water it comes straight back up — I haven't kept anything down for a couple of hours.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sharp discomfort in the upper abdomen, worse with each bout of retching
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any pain in your tummy?
Whereabouts does it hurt, and does anything make it worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a sharp ache high up in my belly, near the middle. It gets worse every time I heave.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Fast breathing, chest tightness, and trembling hands
trigger_question_examples: How is your breathing right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm breathing really fast, my chest feels tight, and my hands are shaking. I feel like I can't get a proper breath.

trigger_question_examples: Are you feeling faint or dizzy?
Are you able to stand up?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel really lightheaded and I can't stand up — I've been on the floor.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No blood or coffee-ground material seen in the vomit at this point
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen any blood, or anything that looks like coffee grounds, in the vomit?
What does the vomit look like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't seen any blood — it's just been stomach fluid so far.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Ongoing grief, shame, and family strain connected to leaving a strict religious community
trigger_question_examples: That sounds really distressing — can you tell me more about what you've been going through?
Has there been a lot going on for you lately?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I lost a community that used to be my whole world, and I carry a lot of shame about who I am from what they taught. My family who are still in it barely speak to me. Seeing that building tonight brought it all crashing back.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really want to get into all of that right now — I just need the vomiting and the panic to stop.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: On sensitive direct questioning, denies any thoughts of self-harm or suicide but describes feeling overwhelmed
trigger_question_examples: When people feel this overwhelmed, they sometimes have thoughts of not wanting to be here or of hurting themselves — are you having any thoughts like that?
Are you feeling safe right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't want to hurt myself — I just feel completely overwhelmed and I want this to stop. My friend is here with me.
